content:
🔥 **【翻譯器】教程┊【Translator】Tutorial** 🔥 

各位守密人，為了方便大家的日常交流，我們在頻道引入了【翻譯器】功能！

► 大家可以透過它自由翻譯貼文、留言、聊天頻道等任一句話~
► 你也可以在對話框輸入目標語言並輸入文案，點選傳送後，文案會變成目標語言的語種~

**以下是詳細使用教學：**

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Dear keepers, in order to facilitate your daily communication, we have introduced the【Translator】function in the channel！

► You can use it to freely translate any sentence in posts, comments, chat channels, etc.~
► You can also enter the target language and text in the dialog box. After clicking send, the text will be converted to the target language.

**Here is the tutorial for using the 【Translator】：**


@everyone

1️⃣  **如何翻譯別人發出的文字內容？**

**► PC端：**滑鼠選取你需要翻譯的文本，然後點擊滑鼠右鍵，點擊【應用程式】→【Translate Text】
**► 手機端：**長按你需要翻譯的文本，彈出選項框後點選【APP】→【Translate Text】

————————————————

1️⃣ **How to translate text sent by others?**

**► 【PC】：**Select the text you need to translate with the mouse, then right-click the mouse and click 【Application】 → 【Translate Text】
**► 【Mobile】：**Long press the text you need to translate, and click【APP】 → 【Translate Text】after the option box pops up

2️⃣ **如何把自己的文案翻譯成其他國家的語言？**

► 在*文本框輸入“/translate”*，在選項內選擇最上方的*“/translate   [text]   [target_language]”*
►在 [text] 框內，用你的常用語言輸入想發的內容
►在 [target_language] 框內，用英文輸入目標語種，如：Japanese、Thai、English…
►點擊傳送後，發出的內容就會變成目標語種的語言

————————————————

2️⃣  **How to translate your copy into other languages?**

► Type** “/translate”* in the text box, and select* “/translate  [text ]   [target_language ]”* *at the top of the options
►In the  [text ]  box, type the content you want to send in your common language
►In the  [target_language ]  box, type the target language in English, such as Japanese, Thai, English, etc.
►After clicking Send, the content sent will be converted to the target language
